I've got a major problem on the L line. The product L50446 variant L was coming out looking like it'd been through a blender, and I could see that the tool was taking a beating. The torque was reading 56.8 Nm and the rotational speed was at 1269.0 rpm, but the tool's wear was already at 195.0 minutes, and I knew we'd be swapping it out soon. I stopped the line and called maintenance to come take a look.

Around that same time, the torque reading was 66.8 Nm and the rotational speed was 1365.0 rpm. The line seemed to be running smoothly, but I did hear a slight grinding noise coming from the tool. I stopped the line and called maintenance to take a look at it.

I noticed the sound of the tool changing, it sounded like it was straining, around 1396 rpm. Then I saw a puff of smoke coming from the tool, and the alarm on the HMI went off. The air temperature was reading 297.3 K, and the process temperature was 308.2 K, a delta of 10.9 K. I stopped the line and called maintenance, but before they arrived, the tool seized up completely and the torque reading went to zero.
